title: lomatolepis glomerata
intro: Lomatolepis glomerata, also known as globe fern, is a type of small, terrestrial fern that belongs to the family Blechnaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lomatolepis glomerata include its ability to reduce inflammation, treat skin conditions, and support respiratory health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
